political.s: FEC: $116K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 9 executive donors.

charity.s: $145M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.17% of revenue) via Lowe's Charitable & Educational Foundation. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #84 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Newsweek Most Trustworthy Companies in America — ranked #52 (2024).
charity.amt: ~$100M+ (Hometowns program over 5 years; $250M Foundation commitment over 10 years)
charity.focus: Skilled trades workforce development, community revitalization, affordable housing, disaster relief

environment.s: environmental violation: $18.6M in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

dei.s: JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #84 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

animals.s: Lowe's is a home improvement retailer (not a cosmetics brand), so traditional animal-testing certifications are not applicable; however, PETA has campaigned against Lowe's for years over its sale of glue traps. As of September 2025, Lowe's removed glue traps from its website following multi-year PETA pressure, but has not yet extended the ban to physical store shelves.

citations.title: Lowe's Stops Selling Glue Traps Online | PETA
Lowe's to Face Probe Over Glue Trap Sales at Annual Meeting | PETA
Lowe's Can No Longer Claim Traps Are Humane | PETA

guns.s: No federal firearms license on record for this company in the ATF FFL registry — no licensed firearms dealing or manufacturing.

privacy.s: In September 2024, Lowe's disclosed a data breach to the Maine Attorney General in which an unauthorized third party obtained employee Workday login credentials and accessed PII (names, addresses, DOB, email, phone, bank account numbers) for 944 people. Lowe's also publishes a consumer privacy statement covering CCPA and Nevada opt-out rights, but no FTC enforcement actions or regulatory fines against Lowe's were found.

citations.title: Data Breach Notices | Maine Attorney General – Lowe's Companies, Inc.
Lowe's Home Improvement U.S. Privacy Statement

wiki.controversies:
===All-American Muslim advertising controversy===
Lowe's withdrew its advertising from the TLC reality television show All-American Muslim in December 2011. A spokesperson for Lowe's said, "we understand the program raised concerns, complaints, or issues from multiple sides of the viewer spectrum, which we found after doing research of news articles and blogs covering the show".

Lowe's faced a backlash from several quarters, including Muslim-American and Arab-American organizations. The American-Arab Anti-Discrimination Committee called upon members to contact Lowe's to urge it to reverse its position. The Los Angeles chapter of the Council on American-Islamic Relations met to consider possible actions, including boycotts and protests. Several celebrities also called for a boycott. California State Senator Ted Lieu called Lowe's decision "naked religious bigotry" and said he would consider legislative action if Lowe's did not apologize to Muslim Americans and reinstate the ads. Abraham Foxman of the Anti-Defamation League expressed similar views. Keith Ellison, the first Muslim elected to the United States Congress, criticized Lowe's decision to "uphold the beliefs of a fringe hate group and not the creed of the First Amendment". Representative John Conyers of Michigan called on Lowe's to apologize. Michigan state representative Rashida Tlaib contacted the company's corporate headquarters, reporting that Lowe's declined to change its decision.
wiki.extract: Lowe's Companies, Inc. is an American retail company specializing in home improvement. Headquartered in Mooresville, North Carolina, the company operates a chain of retail stores in the United States. As of October 28, 2022, Lowe's and its related businesses operated 2,181 home improvement and hardware stores in North America.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall to lower level from collapsing structure or equipment  less than 6 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was handling a small platform ladder with three steps and two wheels in the front. The employee was found on the floor underneath the ladder. She was hospitalized with multiple fractures to the sacrum.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was escorting a forklift inside a store. While walking backward, the employee tripped on a pallet and fell, suffering a broken hip.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by running powered equipment  n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was cutting wood on a table saw when his thumb contacted the saw blade. The employee's thumb was partially amputated.

sampleRecords.employer: Lowe's Home Centers, LLC dba Lowe's of Mount Vernon
sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level  6 to 30 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On May 26, 2025, at approximately 7:22 PM an employee fell approximately 9 feet from an order picker while pulling a grill from upper shelving. The employee was hospitalized for a head injury.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was working in the mulch loading area when they tripped over a pallet of product and broke an ankle.

The mirrors' glass can detach from the wall attachment base and fall, posing injury and laceration hazards.

sampleRecalls.title: Enerco Recalls DEWALT 70,000 BTU Outdoor Portable Cordless Forced Air Propane Heaters Due to Fire and Burn Hazards; Sold Exclusively at Lowe's
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves DEWALT 70,000 BTU outdoor portable cordless forced air propane heaters model number DXH70CFAVX. The heaters are yellow and black. The model number is located on the hang tag. "DEWALT" is printed in black on the side of the bottom yellow portion of the units.
hazards: The recalled portable heaters' operating instructions can cause consumers to incorrectly depress the start button too quickly and prevent the fan from starting…
injuries: The firm has received 11 reports of overheating. No injuries have been reported.
products: DEWALT 70,000 BTU Outdoor Portable Cordless Forced Air Propane Heaters
units: About 21,250 (In addition, about 500 were sold in Canada)

sampleRecalls.title: Homewerks Worldwide Recalls Allen + Roth Lighted Bathroom Mirrors Due to Injury and Laceration Hazards; Sold Exclusively at Lowe's
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Allen + Roth-branded lighted dimmable LED wall mirrors, manufactured from December 2022 through August 2023. The recalled bathroom vanity anti-fog mirrors are frameless and have a touch sensor button for the dimmable LED light. They were sold in three different sizes. Homewerks model number 75-102…
hazards: The mirrors' glass can detach from the wall attachment base and fall, posing injury and laceration hazards.
injuries: Lowe's has received 44 reports of the mirror's glass detaching from the wall attachment base. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: Origin 21 Wall Mirrors Sold Exclusively at Lowe's Stores Recalled Due to Laceration and Impact Hazards; Manufactured by Huahong Art Home Shares
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Origin 21 oval and rectangle wall mirrors. These mirrors were sold in black metal frames. The rectangle mirror measures 22 inches wide and 31 inches long, with model number L1-MH-1647. The oval mirror measures 24 inches wide and 36 inches long, with model number L1-MH-1693. The model numbers a…
hazards: The recalled mirrors can detach from the metal plate used for hanging, causing the mirror to fall, posing laceration and impact hazards.
injuries: The firm has received 15 reports of the mirrors separating from the metal hanger and falling. No injuries have been reported.
products: Origin 21 Oval and Rectangle Black Framed Wall Mirrors

sampleRecalls.title: FNA Group Recalls Simpson Pressure Washers Due to Burn Hazard; Sold Exclusively at Lowe's
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Simpson Gas Pressure Washers with model number PS61264. The pressure washers are black in color. The Simpson logo, "Pro Series" and 4400 PSI are printed on the handle of the unit. The model number is printed on a silver label on the unit's frame.
hazards: The lithium battery in the electric start system can overheat, posing a burn hazard.
injuries: FNA has received two reports of batteries in the pressure washer's electric start feature overheating and damaging the units. No injuries have been reported.
products: Simpson Gas Pressure Washers with Electric Start

sampleRecalls.title: Twin-Star International Recalls Infrared Quartz Electric Fireplaces Due to Fire Hazard; Sold Exclusively at Lowe's
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Twin-Star Style Selections 42-inch-wide, 5,200 BTU, Black Infrared Quartz Electric Fireplace with model No. 42HF295FGT manufactured before January 2023 and identified with the following date codes: 0521; 0322; 0422; 0522; 0622; 0722; and 0822. "Twin-Star International, Inc." and the model number a…
hazards: The electric fireplaces can overheat, posing a fire hazard.
injuries: Twin-Star and Lowe's have received 24 reports of overheating, fire or smoke incidents. These include two reports of property damage. No injuries have been reported.
products: Style Selections 42-inch-wide Infrared Quartz Electric Fireplaces
